bird.name: 黑腹裂籽雀
bird.summary: 黑腹裂籽雀（学名：Pyrenestes ostrinus），是梅花雀科裂籽雀属的一种，分布于乌干达、加蓬、科特迪瓦、安哥拉、加纳、中非共和国、赞比亚、尼日利亚、赤道几内亚、肯尼亚、贝宁、坦桑尼亚、多哥、刚果民主共和国、苏丹、喀麦隆、刚果和冈比亚。全球活动范围约为3,880,00…

relations.subject: 黑腹裂籽雀
relations.evidence: They live in most Central African countries and inhabit tropical rainforest
relations.object_summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

relations.subject: 黑腹裂籽雀
relations.evidence: Black-bellied seedcrackers inhabit tropical rainforest of Africa and nest in moist environments, near swamps, marsh, ponds, wet prairies and in moist broadleaf forest
relations.object_summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

relations.subject: 黑腹裂籽雀
relations.evidence: Black-bellied seedcrackers inhabit tropical rainforest of Africa and nest in moist environments, near swamps, marsh, ponds, wet prairies and in moist broadleaf forest
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 黑腹裂籽雀
relations.evidence: M.|last6=Collingham|first6=Yvonne C.|last7=Rahbek|first7=Carsten|last8=Huntley|first8=Brian|date=2009|title=Projected impacts of climate change on a continent-wide protected area network|journal=Ecology Letters |volume=12|issue=5|pages=420–431|doi=10.1111/j.1461-0248.2009.01297.x|pmid=19379136|issn=1461-023X}} Nowadays, the main threats faced by black-bellied seedcrackers emanate from nest predation by rats, snakes and feral cats, habitat over harvest and window collisions (increasing with urbanization)
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
